rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CAROL H. ELVIN TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Respondent Minerva House Inc Answers To Form Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: (1) Petitioner's Motion To Compel Respondent Minerva House, Inc.'s Answers To Form Interrogatories, Set One; Response To Demand For Production of Documents and Other Tangible Things, Set Two; Response To Supplemental Demand For Production and Inspection of Documents and other Tangible Things, Set One, is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent Minerva House, Inc. is ordered to respond without objection within five days of notice of this order. Respondent Minerva House, Inc.'s failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Respondent Minerva House, Inc. is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Respondent Minerva House, Inc. in the amount of $661.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. (612/EHEWLETT)
